title: Best sleep in years
body: The Brightside Hybrid completely fixed my back pain. Firm but cushioned, and it sleeps cool. I recommend it to everyone.

title: Great mattress, long delivery
body: Really comfortable once it arrived, but the boxed delivery took almost three weeks. Worth the wait in the end.

title: Cloud-like and cool
body: No more waking up hot. The Hybrid breathes really well and the edge support is solid for sitting on the side.

title: Too soft for me
body: It was much softer than I expected and I sank in too far. Returns were handled fine, but the firmness rating felt off.

title: Pillow is a game changer
body: Bought the cooling pillow to go with the mattress and it's fantastic. Holds its shape all night.

title: Solid value
body: Comparable to mattresses twice the price. Took a couple of nights to break in but very happy now.

title: Good but motion transfer
body: Comfortable, but I feel my partner move more than I'd like. The Hybrid might have been the better pick for us.

title: Exceeded expectations
body: Set up in minutes, expanded fully within an hour, and felt premium from night one. The 100-night trial sealed it.

title: Arrived damaged
body: My first mattress had a torn seam. Support replaced it quickly, but the initial experience was frustrating.

title: Hot sleeper approved
body: I run hot and this is the first mattress that hasn't left me sweating. The cooling cover really works.
